text: Plastic doesn’t disappear; it just breaks down. Microplastics are tiny plastic fragments invading our oceans, lurking in every corner. They travel up the food web, from plankton to fish… and even into our plates. Research from NOAA shows microplastics can disrupt marine life and ecosystems. But don’t panic! Scientists are working to understand and tackle this issue. Stay informed and protect our oceans. Hit like and follow for more science insights!
